name: Filter
summary: Evaluates a condition expression on each payload and routes to Passed or Failed output ports.
description:
# Filter

Evaluates a boolean condition expression against the incoming payload. Payloads that satisfy the condition are emitted on `Passed`; those that do not are emitted on `Failed`. Both output ports carry the original payload unchanged.

## Use cases
- Gate a flow on a confidence score threshold
- Separate valid records from invalid ones
- Route high-priority items to a fast path

## Condition syntax

Conditions use a simple expression language where `payload` refers to the incoming object:

```
payload.score > 0.7
payload.status == "active"
payload.tags contains "urgent"
```

Complex expressions with `&&` and `||` are supported.

inputs.name: AnyPayload
inputs.description: Any payload to evaluate the condition against.

outputs.name: Passed
outputs.description: Emitted when the condition evaluates to true. Contains the original payload unchanged.

outputs.name: Failed
outputs.description: Emitted when the condition evaluates to false. Contains the original payload unchanged.

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: Boolean expression to evaluate. Use 'payload' to reference fields of the incoming object.

passLabel.title: Pass Label
passLabel.description: Display label for the Passed output port in Studio.

failLabel.title: Fail Label
failLabel.description: Display label for the Failed output port in Studio.
